question: Based on these maps, what can you conclude about which crime type has higher overall rates across states?

options.A: Violent crimes clearly have higher overall rates than property crimes
options.B: Property crimes clearly have higher overall rates than violent crimes
options.C: Both violent and property crimes have similar overall rates across states
options.D: It cannot be determined from these maps alone which crime type has higher overall rates

explanation: Both maps reuse the same threshold scale, but their underlying distributions differ. This can make one map appear more intense simply because more states fall into the top bin. In the underlying data, Violent Crimes has the higher average value, so that is the only reliable conclusion.
